name: OA Robotics
subject: A free FRC learning site for OA Robotics
body:
Hi OA Robotics team,

I'm Jahaan Pardhanani, software lead on FRC 5835. I built a free site, LearnFRC (https://learnfrc.systemerr.com), with structured guides and quizzes for every FRC department — mechanical, CAD, programming, electrical, scouting, business, the Impact Award, and more. It's made for onboarding and training new members, and it's completely free.

Teams have already completed 100+ lessons on it. If it's useful for your team this season I'd love that — and I'd genuinely appreciate any feedback.

Thanks for what you do for FRC,
Jahaan Pardhanani
FRC 5835 · learnfrc.systemerr.com

Teams have already completed 100+ lessons on it. If it's useful for your team this season I'd love that — and I'd genuinely appreciate any feedback.

Thanks for what you do for FRC,
